records.ety: [OE. buggen, buggen, bien, AS. bycgan, akin to OS. buggean, Goth. bugjan.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Bought (bt); p. pr. & vb. n. Buying (bī"ng).]

defs: To acquire the ownership of (property) by giving an accepted price or consideration therefor, or by agreeing to do so; to acquire by the payment of a price or value; to purchase; -- opposed to sell.
quotes: Buy what thou hast no need of, and ere long thou wilt sell thy necessaries.

defs: To acquire or procure by something given or done in exchange, literally or figuratively; to get, at a cost or sacrifice; to buy pleasure with pain.
quotes: Buy the truth and sell it not; also wisdom, and instruction, and understanding.

defs: To negotiate or treat about a purchase.
quotes: I will buy with you, sell with you.
